TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Kinayiman, title = Kinayiman, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kinayiman} }

S.FORM: Kinayiman Itiniay i Chunri Cen no Pingtung ko Kinayiman a niyaro', 243 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 781 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 89% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 696 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 11% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 85 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan 88%, Bunun 1%, roma 1%. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'.
S.PHON: kinajiman itiniaj i ¶ńßo~u~unri ¶…ôn no~u piŇčto~u~uŇč ko~u kinajiman a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u paiwan **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u im…ôŇč i nijaro~u °.
S.FORM: Kinayiman Itiniay i Chunri Cen no Pingtung ko Kinayiman a niyaro', 243 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 781 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 89% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 696 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 11% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 85 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan 88%, Bunun 1%, roma 1%. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'.
S.PHON: kinajiman itiniaj i ¶ńßo~u~unri ¶…ôn no~u piŇčto~u~uŇč ko~u kinajiman a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u paiwan **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, ro~uma *%. ira ko~u im…ôŇč i nijaro~u °.
